final:
// // This module selects between two RGB colors based on the 'sel' input. When 'sel' is 0, 'rgb_1' is selected and vice versa.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input sel,
    input [23:0] rgb_0,
    input [23:0] rgb_1,
    output reg [23:0] rgb_out
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if(sel == 1'b0) begin
        rgb_out <= rgb_0;
    end else begin
        rgb_out <= rgb_1;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module selects between two RGB colors based on the 'sel' input. When 'sel' is 0, 'rgb_1' is selected and vice versa.
